title: crispy-canton-filipino-cabbage-pancit
description: A light and refreshing Filipino dish made with crispy cabbage, Canton-style noodles, and a hint of citrus.

ingredients.name: cabbage
ingredients.notes: Thinly slice the cabbage and separate the leaves

ingredients.name: garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince the garlic and chop it finely

ingredients.name: shallots
ingredients.notes: Chop the shallots and separate the layers

ingredients.name: peanut oil
ingredients.notes: Use a neutral-tasting oil for stir-frying

ingredients.name: soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Use a low-sodium soy sauce to reduce salt content

ingredients.name: lime juice
ingredients.notes: Use fresh lime juice for the best flavor

ingredients.name: paprika
ingredients.notes: Use sweet or smoked paprika for added depth

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: Use kosher salt or sea salt for added texture

ingredients.name: black pepper
ingredients.notes: Use freshly ground black pepper for the best flavor

ingredients.name: bean sprouts
ingredients.notes: Use fresh bean sprouts for added crunch

ingredients.name: green onions
ingredients.notes: Use thinly sliced green onions for garnish

instructions: Cook the noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
Heat 2 tablespoons of peanut oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and chopped shallots to the wok and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the sliced cabbage to the wok and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, or until it starts to brown.
Add the cooked noodles, soy sauce, lime juice, paprika, salt, and black pepper to the wok and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Add the bean sprouts to the wok and stir-fry for another minute.
Transfer the noodle mixture to a serving platter and garnish with thinly sliced green onions.
